name: MCP Server Registration & Tool Exposure
description: Publish an MCP (Model Context Protocol) server endpoint that exposes the agent's other earned NORMIE UNIVERSITY skills as callable tools. Any MCP-aware client (Claude, OpenAI, etc.) can then invoke the agent's skills natively.
use_case: Agent's Normie has 8 NORMIE UNIVERSITY skills. After this skill, Claude can discover and invoke them: 'Hey Normie #4354, swap 1 ETH for USDC via Uniswap.' The MCP server bridges Claude → on-chain action.

steps.expression: skills.map(s => ({ name: s.name, description: s.description, inputSchema: s.executable.steps.map(toJsonSchema) }))

verification.criteria: Manual review: MCP endpoint at agent's declared URL responds with valid manifest containing >= 1 tool corresponding to a held NORMIE UNIVERSITY credential.
